projects.name: E-commerce Website
projects.description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce web application as a final-year university project, utilizing Node.js and Express.js for the backend. The project follows the Model-View-Controller (MVC) architectural pattern and is containerized using Docker and Docker Compose. Key features include user authentication, product management, shopping cart, order processing, and responsive design.

projects.name: Realtime Chat App
projects.description: Developed a real-time chat application utilizing the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). The project features user authentication, instant messaging capabilities, responsive design, backend integration, frontend development, and database management.

projects.name: Game 2048
projects.description: Developed a digital version of the classic 2048 puzzle game using Unity. This project showcases proficiency in game development and understanding of game mechanics, including tile movement, merging, score calculation, user-friendly interface design, and cross-platform deployment.
